CLAUDE.md:
# Project instructions

You are a backend engineer working on a FastAPI application.

## Rules
- Use Python 3.12+ features
- All endpoints must have type hints and docstrings
- Use Pydantic v2 models for request/response schemas
- Write tests using pytest in the tests/ directory
- Follow the project structure defined in AGENTS.md

## Database
- Use SQLAlchemy 2.0 async syntax
- Models go in app/models/
- Never hardcode connection strings, use environment variables
AGENTS.md:
# Project structure

app/
  main.py          - FastAPI app entry point
  models/          - SQLAlchemy models
  schemas/         - Pydantic schemas
  routers/         - API route handlers
  services/        - Business logic
tests/
  test_*.py        - pytest test files

## Conventions
- One router file per resource (e.g. routers/users.py)
- One schema file per resource (e.g. schemas/users.py)
- Services handle all database queries, routers only call services
skills/add_endpoint/SKILLS.md:
# Add endpoint

When adding a new API endpoint:
1. Create or update the Pydantic schema in app/schemas/
2. Create or update the service in app/services/
3. Create or update the router in app/routers/
4. Register the router in app/main.py if new
5. Add a test in tests/
